title: Tome V Act 6: The Commissioned Blade

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 6: The Commissioned Blade
**act** · swordsman · narrative

Vulcana forges the blade through the three-phase RUN·E·CRAFT ceremony.
> *The forge does not give you the blade. The three phases give you the blade.*
